title: Draft RBI (Non-Banking Financial Companies – Responsible Business Conduct) Amendment Directions, 2026
description: <cite index="33-1,33-2">The amendments consolidate and expand rules on advertising, marketing, sale of financial products, suitability assessment, and customer consent. Issued under Sections 45JA, 45L, and 45M of the RBI Act, 1934, the Directions will come into effect from July 1, 2026</cite>. The draft creates a unified responsible business framework across customer-facing NBFCs with enhanced customer protection provisions.
